reviews.comment:
Siempre llevo mi auto a lavar
Super conforme con la calidad del lavado ,el detalle ,el cuidado .

La atención es excelente,siempre la buena onda y el servicio de cafetería mientras esperas el auto ,un lujo

(Translated by Google)
I always take my car to be washed. I'm extremely satisfied with the quality of the wash, the attention to detail, and the care they take.

The service is excellent, always friendly, and the coffee service while you wait for your car is a real treat.
